(a) Optical image of the scanned sample. (b) Elemental image of lithium (Li 670.79 nm) at 2 μm lateral resolution. Positive (besides aluminum collectors) and negative electrodes (besides copper collectors) are respectively represented by a high and low signal of lithium.
